channel.title: Microcontroller on Abdulkadir Güngör
channel.description: Recent content in Microcontroller on Abdulkadir Güngör

item.title: Professional Debugging Strategies and In-Depth Analysis Techniques in Embedded Systems Development
item.description: Debugging in the world of embedded systems requires overcoming obstacles such as hardware constraints, real-time requirements, and limited visibility, unlike standard desktop software. The question “The code is running, but why is the system locking up?” is the nightmare of every embedded software engineer. In this article, advanced techniques, code examples, and hardware architectures used to quickly detect errors and stabilize the system in modern embedded projects are discussed.

item.title: Architectural Decision Processes in IoT Projects: A Technical Analysis of ESP32 and ESP8266 Microcontrollers
item.description: In the Internet of Things (IoT) ecosystem, hardware selection plays a decisive role in a project’s sustainability, power consumption, and processing capacity. Developed by Espressif Systems, the ESP8266 and its successor, the ESP32, have revolutionized the world of embedded systems by offering low-cost Wi-Fi integration. However, these two platforms represent significantly different spectrums in terms of architecture.
